label: Dog
description: Animal instinct or the call of the material world.

label: Staff
description: Support for the journey and a symbol of direction.

label: The Infinity Symbol
description: Infinite possibilities and the eternal nature of the spirit.

label: The Artisan's Table
description: The physical world where manifestation occurs.

label: Pomegranate
description: Fertility, the underworld, and the seeds of knowledge.

label: Crescent Moon
description: Intuition, mystery, and the illumination of the hidden psyche.

label: Popess' Scepter
description: Spirituality, divine connection, and the silent authority of knowledge.

label: Jachin and Boaz
description: Boaz and Jachin, representing duality and severity/mercy.

label: Eagle Shield
description: Spiritual power and sovereignty.

label: Empress' Scepter
description: Fertility, creative power, and the nurturing rule over the physical world.

label: Ducal Throne Pillars
description: Vertical architectural supports integrated into the imperial seat.They signify the rigid stability of the state and earthly power.

label: Eagle Hat
description: The eagle represents the temporal power of the state.

label: Emperor's Scepter
description: Structure, worldly dominion, and the firm execution of order.

label: Pope's Scepter
description: Traditional doctrine, religious leadership, and the bridge to the sacred.

label: The Sacred Gateway
description: Free-standing columns framing a central religious figure. They represent the structural laws of the Church and the boundary between the congregation and the divine.

label: Angel
description: Divine intervention and the higher self overseeing choices.

label: Lion
description: Raw passion and animal nature calmed by spiritual grace.

label: Winged Bull
description: Representing the fixed sign Taurus and the element Earth.

label: Winged Lion
description: Representing the fixed sign Leo and the element Fire.

label: Winged Eagle
description: Representing the fixed sign Scorpio and the element Water.

label: Winged Angel
description: Representing the fixed sign Aquarius and the element Air.

label: Scales of Justice
description: Balance, fairness, and the weighing of truth.

label: Sword
description: The power of logic and the cutting away of falsehood.

label: The Pillars of Truth
description: The unwavering neutrality of the law, they provide the balance required for the scales of justice.

label: Scythe
description: The tool of harvest and the inevitable end of cycles.

label: The River of Life
description: It symbolizes the boundary between the physical and spiritual worlds and the inevitable passage of time and transition.

label: Vases
description: The alchemy of the soul and the mixing of opposites.

label: The Tempering Stream
description: The fluid poured between two vessels. It represents the "Life Force" being refined and the alchemical blending of opposites to create a balanced internal state.

label: Horns
description: Animalistic desires and the ego's trap.

label: Chains
description: Voluntary bondage to materialism and addiction.

label: Lightning
description: Sudden divine intervention or a flash of overwhelming truth.

label: Falling Crown
description: The ego being stripped of its false authority.

label: Eight-pointed Star
description: Celestial guidance and the harmony of the cosmos.

label: The Living Springs
description: Water poured onto both land and sea. It symbolizes the restoration of the soul and the continuous replenishment of the collective subconscious.

label: Wolf
description: The wild, untamed nature of the subconscious.

label: The Domesticated Dog
description: The domesticated, civilized aspect of the human mind.

label: Crayfish
description: Primordial fears emerging from the depths of the psyche.

label: The Boundary Towers
description: The threshold between the known world and the unknown.

label: The Primordial Abyss
description: It represents the deep, hidden layers of the psyche and the primitive instincts that surface during the night of the soul.

label: Trumpet
description: The call to spiritual awakening and the voice of the divine.

label: Laurel Wreath
description: Victory, protection, and the completion of the great work.
